purpose: Source-paired gold-standard evaluation of facial parsing, neck, landmarks, and supported hair masks.
evaluation_rule: Run the production masking route on an original image without exposing its annotation, normalize the prediction to source coordinates, then compare it with the paired gold annotation.

datasets.pairing_rule: Parse the zero-padded integer before the first underscore in <00000>_<class>.png and pair it with the unpadded <integer>.jpg original.
datasets.annotation_format: separate RGB binary PNG per class; black=0 and white=255
semantic_notes: Use neck as the anatomical neck class.
Treat neck_l as necklace/accessory, not as anatomical neck and not as a lateral-neck class.
A missing class file for an otherwise eligible annotated image represents an empty class only under the dataset convention; never treat an image outside IDs 0-1999 as annotated by shard 0.
datasets.local_usage_boundary: The local README restricts images to non-commercial research and educational use. Do not redistribute or use commercially without separate rights review.

datasets.pairing_rule: Pair image, indexed label PNG, and landmark TXT by exact filename stem within the same split.
datasets.annotation_format: single-channel indexed PNG with observed label values 0 through 10 plus landmark TXT
semantic_notes: LaPa does not provide a body/body-part gold standard and must not clear body-mask gates.
Validate the numeric label-to-class taxonomy against authoritative LaPa metadata before publishing per-class semantic scores.
Keep train, validation, and test roles separate; do not tune thresholds or prompts on test.
datasets.local_usage_boundary: No LaPa license file was found in the supplied local dataset root. Verify upstream license and redistribution terms before any use beyond local evaluation.
